pokeballs.name: Poké Ball
pokeballs.description: A device for catching wild Pokémon

pokeballs.name: Great Ball
pokeballs.description: A good, high-performance Ball that provides a higher catch rate than a standard Poké Ball

pokeballs.name: Ultra Ball
pokeballs.description: An ultra-performance Ball that provides a higher catch rate than a Great Ball

pokeballs.name: Repeat Ball
pokeballs.description: A Ball that works especially well on Pokémon species that were previously caught

pokeballs.name: Safari Ball
pokeballs.description: A special Ball that can only be used in the Safari Zone

pokeballs.name: Net Ball
pokeballs.description: A Ball that works especially well on Water- and Bug-type Pokémon

pokeballs.name: Nest Ball
pokeballs.description: A Ball that works especiall well on Pokémon under level 31

pokeballs.name: Timer Ball
pokeballs.description: A somewhat different Ball that becomes progressively the more turns there are in battle

pokeballs.name: Luxury Ball
pokeballs.description: A comfortable Poké Ball that makes the Pokémon happy

pokeballs.name: Dive Ball
pokeballs.description: A Ball that works especially well on Pokémon encountered while Surfing, Diving or Fishing

pokeballs.name: Dusk Ball
pokeballs.description: A Ball that works especially well if used in a cave or at night

pokeballs.name: Heal Ball
pokeballs.description: A remedial Poké Ball that restores the caught Pokémon's HP and eliminates any status problems

pokeballs.name: Quick Ball
pokeballs.description: A Ball that provides better catch rate if it is used at the start of the wild encounter

pokeballs.name: Premier Ball
pokeballs.description: A rare Poké Ball that has been specially made to commemorate a special occasion

medicine.name: Moomoo Milk
medicine.acquisition: Wild Miltank, Two Island Market, Driftveil Market, Route 210 Café

medicine.name: Full Restore
medicine.effect: Restores 100% HP and cures status ailments

medicine.name: Antidote
medicine.effect: A spray-type medicine that cures poison

medicine.name: Awakening
medicine.effect: A spray type medicine that awakens sleeping Pokémon

medicine.name: Burn Heal
medicine.effect: A spray-type medicine that cures burn

medicine.name: Ice Heal
medicine.effect: It defrosts a Pokémon that has been frozen solid

medicine.name: Parlyz Heal
medicine.effect: A spray-type medicine that cures paralysis

medicine.name: Ether
medicine.effect: Restores 15 PP to a selected single move

medicine.name: Max Ether
medicine.effect: Fully restores PP to a selected single

medicine.name: Elixir
medicine.effect: Restores 10 PP to all moves of a Pokémon

medicine.name: Max Elixir
medicine.effect: Fully restores PP to all moves of a Pokémon

medicine.name: Calcium
medicine.effect: Boosts Sp. Attack EV by 10 points

medicine.name: Zinc
medicine.effect: Boosts Sp. Defense EV by 10 points

medicine.name: Revival Herb
medicine.effect: Revives a fainted Pokémon and restores 50% HP

medicine.name: Ability Capsule
medicine.effect: Changes the Ability of the Pokémon
